Thinking Process:

2.  **Drafting the Haiku:**
    *   Line 1 (5 syllables): Golden leaves descend (5) / Crisp air fills the day (5) / Red leaves fall softly (5)
    *   Line 2 (7 syllables): Whispering winds through the trees (7) / Cool breeze blows through golden trees (7) / Harvest moon shines bright above (7)
